title: T-082 — owner-pool memoization + request-scoped actor org binding for upgrade actions (FT-022)
prompt:
# T-082 — owner-pool memoization + request-scoped actor org binding for upgrade actions (FT-022)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5, §8
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-022** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P1** (M effort)

## Goal
Memoize owner-pool per request and explicitly bind actorOrgId in upgrade-action.

## Implementation contract
1. Introduce `getRequestOwnerPool()` that caches per-request via Node async-local-storage.
2. `withActorOrgBinding(actorUserId)` wraps each Server Action: resolves the actor's org from `user_org_memberships`, sets `app.actor_org_id`, and asserts the URL-provided orgId matches.
3. Mismatch raises 403 'actor_org_mismatch' before any DB write.
4. Tests assert request-scoped reuse and mismatch rejection.

## Files (scope)
- packages/upgrades/src/upgrade-action.ts [modify]
- packages/upgrades/src/__tests__/upgrade-action-binding.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given two upgrade-action calls in the same request, when both run, then the same owner-pool client reference is used.
2. Given a forged URL orgId different from the actor's actual org, when the action runs, then it returns 403 'actor_org_mismatch'.
3. Given a same-org call, when the action runs, then `app.actor_org_id` is set in session and the action succeeds.

## Test strategy
- RED: write upgrade-action-binding.test.ts asserting request-scoped reuse + mismatch rejection before implementation.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/upgrades test upgrade-action-binding`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not leak the owner-pool client across requests.
- Do not skip the actor-org assertion.
- Do not log actor_org_id as PII.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Memoize owner-pool clients per request and bind actor org explicitly on every upgrade Server Action.

Given a same-org call, when the action runs, then `app.actor_org_id` is set in session and the action succeeds.
